title: Support Knowledge Repo Playbook
description: Launch a support-engineer-owned knowledge repo (how-tos, help docs, preemptive fixes), distribute via sales when ready, and enforce content integrity so technical contributors cannot scrape third-party work and rebrand it as company IP.

mindset.principle: A great repo is a growth engine. One stolen article can torch trust with authors, customers, and your own company. Technical skill is not a character reference.

mistakes.label: Ship volume of content with no origin or review rule
Assume top engineers self-police IP and ethics
mistakes.cost: Blind spot; discovery via angry original author

mistakes.label: Burn the whole program because one person stole
mistakes.cost: Lose the preemptive support win; culture of fear

mistakes.label: Build gold and hide it from sales/customers

program_phases.label: Challenge: solve problems before they ring; repo is the vehicle
Support engineers own how-tos and help depth
When quality holds, push to sales for customer use; market it

decision_branches.situation: Need preemptive how-to depth owned by support eng
Repo is strong enough for sales/customers
Copied or scraped third-party content found

steps.name: Set contribution and origin rules before scale

agent_signal.use_when: Support engineers building how-to/knowledge repo. Pushing KB to sales/customers. Need contribution integrity gate after plagiarism risk. Trust but verify technical heroes.
decision_criteria: Charter preemptive solve before dumping docs.
Origin and review rules before external marketing.
Integrity hit: takedown and process fix; do not necessarily kill the program.
agent_signal.operator_context: Field pattern: unreal repo success, then scrape-and-rebrand breach. Govern technical trust.
agent_signal.not_for: Legal advice on IP disputes. Route serious claims to counsel.
trigger_phrases: Support engineers building how-to/knowledge repo. Pushing KB to sales/customers.
Need playbook: Support Knowledge Repo Playbook
